headline: AI Push Boosts Enterprise Clientele: More Upside Ahead for DDOG Stock?
summary: DDOG posts 29% Q4 revenue growth as AI demand and rising enterprise adoption lift bookings and contracts, signaling room to expand within Fortune 500 clients.

headline: Cloud stocks jump, head for best day in nearly a year despite broad market declines
summary: The WisdomTree Cloud Computing Fund (WCLD) gained 4.5% on the session, putting the exchange-traded fund on track for its best day since April 24, 2025.
